#include
<

;
#define
N
2010
vector
<int>
tree
[
N
];
int
dfs
(
int
i
,
int
p
)
{
int
sm
=
0
,
z
=
0
;
for
(
int
j
:
tree
[
i
])
if
(
j
!=
p
)
{
int
x
=
dfs
(
j
,
i
);
sm
+=
x
;
if
(
x
==
0
)
z
++;
}
return
sm
+
max
(
0
,
z
-
1
);
}
int
main
()
{
int
num_tests
;
cin
>>
num_tests
;

(
int
test
=
0
;

<
num_tests

)

int
n
;

>>

;

(
int
i
=
1
;

<
n
;
++
i
)
{
int
u
,
v
;
cin
>>
u
>>
v
;
tree
[
u
].
push_back
(
v
);
tree
[
v
].
push_back
(
u
);
}
if
(
n
==
1
)
cout
<<
"0\n"
;
else
{
int
ans
=
n
;
for
(
int
i
=
1
;
i
<=
n
;
++
i
)
ans
=
min
(
ans
,
1
+
dfs
(
i
,
i
));
cout
<<
ans
<<
'\n'
;
}
for
(
int
i
=
1
;
i
<=
n
;
++
i
)
tree
[
i
].
clear
();
}
}
